description: Recto: Official letter in Arabic script. Very faded. Fragments of ~5 lines are preserved, with wide space between the lines. Verso: Letter/report in Arabic script, maybe the response to recto. Very deferential. The first 10 lines seem to be praises and blessings. The addressee may be named Abū l-Faraj [...] b. Asad (l. 9). Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
